title: China wants Trump to embrace its vision of peace for Taiwan
subhead: Beijing has made the island its top priority, hoping to convince US President Donald Trump, who is visiting China from May 13 to 15, to shift his stance on Taiwan's independence and hold back on selling arms to the island nation.

title: Is there a vaccine or cure for hantavirus?
US Senate confirms Trump nominee Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve chair
Mali's junta effectively under siege since Bamako attack
subhead: Shaken by attacks from jihadists and pro-independence militants on April 25, the military regime has never appeared so fragile. The capital is now under blockade.

title: France blames stomach bug for new cruise outbreak, lifts lockdown on ship holding over 1,700
subhead: Testing confirmed that the outbreak on the Ambition, anchored in the port of Bordeaux in western France, was 'a gastrointestinal infection of viral origin,' the local government and regional health agency said in a statement on Wednesday, allowing asymptomatic individuals to disembark.

title: Paris Saint-Germain win Ligue 1 title
subhead: The reigning European champions will play Arsenal in this season's Champions League final on May 30.

title: 'Zinédine Zidane maintains a political and social awareness that is deeply connected to his own story'
subhead: The sociologist Stéphane Beaud explored in an essay the football player's career, framing it within that of the descendants of Algerian immigrants. In an interview, he explains that the athlete tried to make up for the injustices suffered by his father, who remained at the bottom of the social ladder throughout his life.

How one family and their shipping company dominate Marseille
subhead: 'The shipping giant at the heart of French power' (3/4). Based in France's second-largest city, the company led by Rodolphe Saadé plays a major role in the city but has become less visible since the controversy over excess profits.

title: Wine consumption continues to decline around the world
subhead: Wine consumption fell by 2.7% year-on-year, according to data released on Tuesday by the International Organization of Vine and Wine. But France remains the world's leading wine exporter by value.

title: In Spain, the woman priest challenging the Vatican
subhead: Christina Moreira advocates for women's right to the priesthood, and was excommunicated by the Vatican for seeking the role. She continues her vocation as a parish priest in Galicia, disturbing figures high up in the Catholic Church.
